description.value: > Trade Camel Trade camels are larger and shaggier than their more common cousins, with two humps and long hair. They are also ill-tempered even by camel standards, with a penchant for spitting when annoyed. Statistics: Camel. Nauseating Spit: Once per hour, a trade camel can regurgitate the contents of its stomach, spitting the foul material at a single target within 10 feet as a ranged touch attack. The target must succeed at a Fortitude save (DC = 10 + half the camelâs Hit Dice + the camelâs Constitution modifier) or be nauseated for 1 round.
